description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a vibrant green canvas upper, white rubber toe cap, and white laces. The shoe features metal eyelets for the laces and a white rubber midsole with a black stripe running along its length. On the inner side, there is a circular white patch with black text and a star, characteristic of Converse All Star branding. The back of the shoe displays a small rectangular rubber patch with additional branding. The overall construction appears sturdy, with reinforced stitching along the seams and a classic silhouette suitable for casual urban wear.
description: A green high-top sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and visible Converse All Star branding. The shoe has a canvas upper and a white rubber sole with black detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green canvas upper, white laces, and the clean white rubber toe cap and sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, rounded rubber toe cap, and symmetrical eyelet arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the iconic circular Converse All Star patch and the shoe's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the green heel, white lining, and the rectangular Converse All Star logo patch on the heel tab.
attribute_logo: Circular white patch with black text and star on the inner ankle; rectangular black and white patch on the heel.
